programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Marge and Lisa are horrified when Homer buys a gun. And when Bart and Milhouse find it in the fridge, Marge takes the kids to live in a motel.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Homer takes over as the manager of Bart's American football team after forcing Ned to quit the position. Guest starring Mike Judge as Hank Hill.

programs.title: Hollyoaks
programs.desc: Warren and Jenson go head-to-head over Mercedes. Ro overhears Ste's conversation in The Hutch. And with a secret hanging over them, is a new friendship over before it's begun.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programs.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches. But now it's time for the real carnage: getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved.

programs.title: Celebs Go Dating
programs.desc: It's Professor Green and David Potts' turn to dip their toes into the dating waters, but will they sink or swim? And our celebs enter their very first mixer.

programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Welcome to Wrexham, Love & Death, Animals Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Puzzling with Lucy Worsley, BBC News (escaped prisoner), and My Mum, Your Dad.
